reviews.review_msg: Don't really understand what he was saying, but his powerpoints are great. Do the homework he assigned because exam will be based off homework.
notes are too long and, confused. Midterm and Final are all essay question. Need to memorize lecture notes.
Poor english skills, hard to understand. Due to the lack of communication he doesn't explain very well. Midterm questions are much like those given in class

Sometimes he doesn't look professional during the lecture scratching his head and rubbing the face but he explains the material very precisely. His true/false questions a a bit hard, you need to learn every slide from his notes and pay attention to all details. Extremely helpful in person, fair final. Overall decent prof
